title: Save $1,400 on the Bianchi Specialissima RC Frameset
content:
I ride the Pro version of this chassis and it’s one of my all-time favorite bikes. Here is why you should grab this massive 25% off deal to build your dream race bike before it sells out.

Read the full article at Save $1,400 on the Bianchi Specialissima RC Frameset on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
